name: Why Perplexity Ignores Your Firm Despite Good SEO
description: Why Perplexity Ignores Your Firm Despite Good SEO - Charlotte

step.name: Step 1
step.text: To show up in Perplexity, start by creating factual, Q&A style content. Then, ensure your firm’s name is consistently linked to your practicing city and specialty. Finally, get mentioned in reputable legal directories that AI agents trust. It’s a lot to manage while running a firm. We handle the technical heavy lifting for you. Let’s get you recommended.
